{/* PAGE TITLE */}

Nutrition Information

Learn how calories, macros, and micronutrients fuel your body.

{/* CARD GRID */}
{/* CALORIES */}

🔥 Calories

Calories provide your body with energy. Proper calorie management helps maintain ideal body weight and improves daily performance.

{/* MACROS */}

🍽 Macros

  • • Protein helps build muscle & repair tissues.
  • • Carbs give quick and long-lasting energy.
  • • Fats support hormones and brain function.
{/* MICROS */}

🧪 Micronutrients

Vitamins and minerals boost immunity, increase metabolism, and support healthy functioning of organs and cells.

{/* FOOD TABLE */}

🍎 Common Food Nutrition Chart
